description: A vertical color photograph of a very large American flag (Stars and Stripes) hung vertically down the facade of a tan/beige stone government office building. The flag drapes from the roofline (where two floodlights or light fixtures are visible against an overcast white-gray sky) down across several stories of the building, partly covering rows of dark recessed windows. The flag's blue star canton is at upper left and the red-and-white stripes hang in soft vertical folds. The image is a straightforward documentary/patriotic photograph with no added graphic design, overlaid text, typography, or agency logo on the image itself. The OCR text is spurious noise from the flag's stars and folds; there is no real on-image lettering. Posted on Sept 11, 2025 (the 9/11 anniversary) by the U.S. Department of Labor with the caption 'God Bless America', the intent is patriotic/commemorative sentiment rather than a designed meme. Target audience: general patriotic public.
notable_text: (no on-image text; tweet caption: "God Bless America")
